sections.paragraph:
verb לפרוט

to change (money); divide into small parts; give in detail, detail, specify

verb להיפרט

be changed (money)

verb לפרט

to give in detail, detail, specify

verb פורט

be given in detail, detailed, specified

verb לפרט (>>פירט)

to give in detail, detail, specify

masculine noun

detail; item, element, particular, datum; single, individual

masculine noun

small change; small details

masculine noun

odd
